

| Release         | x86_64 |
|-----------------|--------|
| 26.1            |  ✅    |
| 26.1-xfce       |  ✅    |
| 26.1-gershwin   |  ✅    |

GhostBSD is published as amd64 (x86_64) only. The releases above map to the
official MATE image (`26.1`), the community XFCE image (`26.1-xfce`) and the
community GNUstep "Gershwin" preview (`26.1-gershwin`).
